title: Arlong’s Pride Surfaces
description: On pages 9–12, arlong’s pride surfaces focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong attacks with overwhelming fish-man strength while Luffy fights for Nami and the village.
scene: On pages 9–12, arlong’s pride surfaces focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong attacks with overwhelming fish-man strength while Luffy fights for Nami and the village.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Do you still not understand that no matter how many times you try...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That it's futile to crush my teeth!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Could it be!? That this has to do with the idea brother Luffy came up with...!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So he has no secret strategy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Just how long do you plan to play around!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: gyaaaa! I've been bitten by a shark!!!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
